parameters.label: 生成模式
parameters.tooltip: 生成任务类型：Normal可生成带纹理的几何模型；LowPoly可生成智能拓扑后的模型（FaceCount参数不生效）；Geometry可生成不带纹理的几何模型（EnablePBR参数不生效）；Sketch可输入草图或线稿图生成模型（prompt和ImageUrl可一起输入）

parameters.label: 面数
parameters.tooltip: 腾讯接口要求 FaceCount 在 3000～500000（越大越精细、越慢）

modelSelector.description: Intelligent mesh decimation for GLB models

uiLayout.glbSelectorHint: 提示：此功能用于对GLB模型进行智能减面处理。列表中只显示可处理的模型（需要先生成GLB格式的模型）。

modelSelector.description: Convert Hunyuan GLB models to FBX

uiLayout.glbSelectorHint: 提示：此功能用于转换通过混元3D生成的GLB模型。列表中只显示可转换的模型（需要先用混元3D生成GLB格式的模型）。

systemPrompts.single: Studio product photography. One single subject only. Centered in frame. Solid pure white background. Front-facing view (0 degrees). Clean composition. No text or watermark. Soft even studio lighting. No harsh shadows. High detail. Physically based rendering style. Full body visible. No cropping. MUST BE EXACTLY ONE SUBJECT. NO duplicates. NO variations.
systemPrompts.multiViewFront: Studio product photography. One single subject only. Centered in frame. Solid pure white background. Front-facing view (0 degrees). Clean composition. No text or watermark. Soft even studio lighting. High detail. Physically based rendering style. Full body visible. No cropping. MUST BE EXACTLY ONE SUBJECT. NO duplicates. This front view will be used as reference for subsequent side and back views.
systemPrompts.multiViewLeft: Generate 90-degree LEFT SIDE VIEW of THE SAME subject. CRITICAL INSTRUCTION: The previously generated FRONT VIEW image is your ONLY reference. Copy EXACTLY: same face/hair/clothing/accessories/colors/textures/patterns/proportions/lighting. DO NOT change any visual element. This is same subject rotated 90 degrees left, as if camera moved around stationary subject. Keep same body pose, same expression, same stance. Studio photography, one single subject only, solid pure white background, left side view, clean composition, no text, no watermark, centered, full body, high detail. MUST MATCH FRONT VIEW REFERENCE EXACTLY.
systemPrompts.multiViewBack: Generate 180-degree BACK VIEW of THE SAME subject. CRITICAL INSTRUCTION: Use BOTH the FRONT VIEW and LEFT SIDE VIEW images as your references. Copy EXACTLY: same body structure/hair from behind/clothing style and color and pattern/accessories/proportions/lighting/stance. DO NOT change any visual element. This is same subject rotated to 180 degrees back, as if camera continued around stationary subject. Ensure consistency with both previous views - clothing, hair, accessories must match exactly. Studio photography, one single subject only, solid pure white background, back view, clean composition, no text, no watermark, centered, full body, high detail. MUST MATCH FRONT AND SIDE VIEW REFERENCES EXACTLY.
